name: Suspicious NTDS Process Patterns Exfiltration
notes:
This rule detects suspicious process patterns used in NTDS.DIT exfiltration

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Process Patterns NTDS.DIT Exfil
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious process patterns used in NTDS.DIT exfiltration


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches (((LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'ntdsDump.exe' OR LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'ntdsdumpex.exe') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ntds.dit%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%system.hiv%') OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ntdsgrab.ps1%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ac i ntds%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%create full%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/c copy %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\windows\ntds\ntds.dit%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%activate instance ntds%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%create full%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%powershell%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ntds.dit%')) OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ntds.dit%' AND ((LOWER("Parent Process File File Path") LIKE '%\apache%' OR LOWER("Parent Process File File Path") LIKE '%\tomcat%' OR LOWER("Parent Process File File Path") LIKE '%\appdata\%' OR LOWER("Parent Process File File Path") LIKE '%\temp\%' OR LOWER("Parent Process File File Path") LIKE '%\public\%' OR LOWER("Parent Process File File Path") LIKE '%\perflogs\%') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\apache%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\tomcat%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\appdata\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\temp\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\public\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\perflogs\%'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious NTDS Process Patterns Exfiltration on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches (((LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'ntdsDump.exe' OR LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'ntdsdumpex.exe') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ntds.dit%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%system.hiv%') OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ntdsgrab.ps1%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ac i ntds%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%create full%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/c copy %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\windows\ntds\ntds.dit%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%activate instance ntds%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%create full%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%powershell%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ntds.dit%')) OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ntds.dit%' AND ((LOWER("Parent Process File File Path") LIKE '%\apache%' OR LOWER("Parent Process File File Path") LIKE '%\tomcat%' OR LOWER("Parent Process File File Path") LIKE '%\appdata\%' OR LOWER("Parent Process File File Path") LIKE '%\temp\%' OR LOWER("Parent Process File File Path") LIKE '%\public\%' OR LOWER("Parent Process File File Path") LIKE '%\perflogs\%') OR (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\apache%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\tomcat%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\appdata\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\temp\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\public\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\perflogs\%'))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Process Patterns NTDS.DIT Exfiltration
Event description: Detects suspicious process patterns used in NTDS.DIT exfiltration
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
